CREATE TABLE test_arrays (id Int32, values Array(Int32));
SELECT arrayAvg(values) AS avg_values FROM test_arrays;
SELECT arrayAvg(x -> (x * 2), values) AS avg_doubled FROM test_arrays;
SELECT id, arrayAvg(values) AS avg_values FROM test_arrays GROUP BY id HAVING avg_values > 2;
SELECT arrayAvg(t.values) AS avg_values FROM (SELECT values FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 1) AS t;
CREATE TABLE test_arrays_large AS SELECT arrayJoin([1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9]) AS value;
SELECT arrayAvg(arrayJoin([1, 2, 3]), value) AS avg_joined FROM test_arrays_large;
SELECT id, arrayAvg(x -> (x * x), values) AS avg_squared FROM test_arrays GROUP BY id ORDER BY avg_squared DESC;
SELECT id, arrayAvg(values) AS avg_values FROM test_arrays WHERE arraySize(values) > 0;
CREATE TABLE test_nested (group_id Int32, nested_values Array(Array(Int32));
SELECT group_id, arrayAvg(arrayMap(x -> arrayAvg(x), nested_values)) AS avg_nested FROM test_nested;
SELECT arrayAvg(values) FROM test_arrays WHERE arrayExists(x -> x > 5, values);
SELECT arrayAvg(cast(arrayJoin(values) AS Float64)) AS avg_float FROM test_arrays;
